title: lygodium scandens
intro: Lygodium scandens, also known as climbing fern, is a species of fern in the family Lygodiaceae. It is a climbing or twining plant that is commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lygodium scandens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
